creator: michiel@vanbaak.eu
text:
Changelog (not provided as URL, taken from the Releases page inside the sonarr app)

New:
Improve messaging for rejected quality upgrades
Preserve language tags when importing subtitle files
Add maximum single episode age option (per indexer)

Fixed:
Migrations on SQLite 3.41.0
Improve WebDL and WebRip Parsing
Logging when series folder is moved successfully
Improve moving file to location where another one exists
